name: MOTORCAR PARTS OF AMERICA
summary: Motorcar Parts of America, Inc. (MPAA) is a remanufacturer, manufacturer and distributor of automotive parts including alternators, starters, brake calipers, brake master cylinders, wheel cylinders, brake power boosters, rotors, drums, brake shoes and clutch assemblies. Their products are primarily sold to retailers, distributors, and warehouse distributors. The company is headquartered in California.
